parameters.query:
SELECT e.name as engagement_name, e.testing_window_start, e.testing_window_end, e.type,
       c.name as client_name,
       COUNT(nf.id) FILTER (WHERE nf.severity='critical') as criticals,
       COUNT(nf.id) FILTER (WHERE nf.severity='high') as highs,
       COUNT(nf.id) FILTER (WHERE nf.severity='medium') as mediums,
       COUNT(nf.id) FILTER (WHERE nf.severity='low') as lows,
       COUNT(nf.id) FILTER (WHERE nf.validation_status='verified_fixed') as fixed,
       COUNT(nf.id) FILTER (WHERE nf.validation_status IN ('validated','analyst_reviewed')) as open_validated,
       COUNT(nf.id) FILTER (WHERE nf.is_recurring=true) as recurring,
       ROUND(AVG(nf.recon_score),2) as avg_score,
       em.total_assets, em.assets_tested, em.coverage_pct
FROM engagements e
JOIN clients c ON e.client_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN normalized_findings nf ON nf.engagement_id = e.id
LEFT JOIN engagement_metrics em ON em.engagement_id = e.id
WHERE e.id = '{{ $json.engagement_id }}'
GROUP BY e.id, e.name, e.testing_window_start, e.testing_window_end, e.type, c.name, em.total_assets, em.assets_tested, em.coverage_pct;

SELECT nf.title, nf.severity, nf.recon_score, nf.score_explanation, nf.business_impact, a.asset_value
FROM normalized_findings nf
JOIN assets a ON nf.asset_id = a.id
WHERE nf.engagement_id = '{{ $('Normalize').first().json.engagement_id }}'
  AND nf.validation_status IN ('validated','analyst_reviewed')
ORDER BY nf.recon_score DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT owasp_category, COUNT(*) as count
FROM normalized_findings
WHERE engagement_id = '{{ $('Normalize').first().json.engagement_id }}'
  AND owasp_category IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY owasp_category
ORDER BY count DESC;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, report_id: $('Store Executive Report').first().json.id, executive_summary: $('Build Executive Summary').first().json.executive_summary }) }}

meta.description: RECON OS WF-13: Executive Summary — generates risk posture, severity distribution, top priority actions, OWASP breakdown, and key observations for client leadership. POST /webhook/recon-os/reports/executive
